{{CargoOrgan
|name=Chaotic Dragon Tail
|type=Bionic
|rank=red
|id=10708
|idx=66
|description="In the filth of primordial chaos, a massive tail ripped through the void — ushering in the dawn of a new age!"
— Codex Draconis
|skill=On combat start, the Celestial Dragon descends, dealing DMG equal to 120% of ATK, and applies 1 stack of Annihilation to the enemy!
|hp=3810
|def=223
|atk=254
|rush=211
|gene1=In Snail Arena, {race} ATK +140
|gene2=Per Altar God Descent, {race} RUSH +7
Gods Descended: 30/30
|gene3=In Snail Arena, {race} DEF +140
|gene4=Snail Arena, ELMT DMG REDUC +8%
|gene5=Snail Arena, chance to paralyze enemy +4%
|gene6=Crit DMG +10%
|gene7=Paralyze enemy by +4% (Awakened)
|}}
